title: Xylem Inoculation with flg22
author: Cleo Bagchus
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.752hq8e

steps.title: Place 15 µL of flg22 3...
steps.instruction: Place 15 µL of flg22 3 cm above the lesion on the central vein of the leaf.

steps.title: With the needle puncture through the...
steps.instruction: With the needle puncture through the droplet into the central vein three times. Do not puncture the leaf completely. Due to a difference in pressure, the droplet should be sucked into the xylem.

steps.title: Place a second 15 µL of flg22 3
steps.instruction: Place a second 15 µL of flg22 3.5 cm above the lesion on the central vein of the leaf.
